events.event_description: Establishment of nonresident ambassadorial relations with Liechtenstein. The first U.S. Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary (nonresident, based in Bern) presented credentials.

evidence.quote: Madeleine May Kunin, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1997-02-10. Credentials presented: 1997-03-14. Left Bern 1999-08-16.
